meaning: adj.预期的,期待的,[律](有继承权而)期待占有的n.预期者,期待者
examples: An expectant hush fell on the guests.
A sudden roar came from the expectant crowd.
Before a baby even arrives, pediatric dentists encourage expectant parents to get their own teeth checked.
They also urged doctors not to push expectant parents into prenatal testing, or towards abortion.
